courseBadge: CETI AI · Raven March Training · March 24-25, 2026
summary: Student portal for the live Raven 2-day course, with the class sequence, module pages, labs, submissions, resources, challenges, and async follow-through in one place.

blocks.title: Block 1 — The Agentic Coding Paradigm
blocks.coreSkill: PRAO loop, task suitability, structured extraction triage
deliverables: Map Raven freight tasks into Best Fit / Needs Better Spec / Poor Fit.
Anchor shipment-email extraction and exception summaries in the PRAO loop.

blocks.title: Block 2 — Claude Code Foundations
blocks.coreSkill: CLAUDE.md hierarchy, permissions model, GCCF prompting, real PR shipping
deliverables: Pair the lab with a real RavenEye bugfix or backlog issue.

blocks.title: Block 3 — Prompt Engineering Depth
blocks.coreSkill: TCEF prompts, constraint specification, extraction debugging
deliverables: Build a BOL extraction prompt with explicit confidence fields.
Validate PRO numbers, SCAC codes, and lane data with verifiable rules.

blocks.title: Block 4 — Reading Agent Thinking
blocks.coreSkill: Trace reading, intervention, multi-source carrier analysis
deliverables: Read and diagnose carrier-scoring agent traces.
Intervene when an agent loops on incomplete authority or claims data.

close.title: Day 1 Close
close.summary: Synthesis, evening assignment, and async runway activation.
actions: Map the day’s learnings to immediate Raven workflows.
Assign one developer task: ship a PR, extract a BOL, or analyze carrier data.
Preview Day 2 system-building blocks and async access.

blocks.title: Block 5 — Skills & Commands
blocks.coreSkill: YAML skills, slash commands, HUMAN GATE handoffs
deliverables: Author freight-specific skills such as /carrier-check and /bol-extract.
Define where human approval is mandatory before operational action.

blocks.title: Block 6 — MCP Architecture + Building Servers
blocks.coreSkill: Three primitives, TypeScript SDK, schema design, Streamable HTTP production model
deliverables: Classify Raven operations as tools, resources, or prompts.
Draft a real RavenEye endpoint schema for MCP integration.

blocks.title: Block 8 — Multi-Agent Systems
blocks.coreSkill: Parallel composition, routing, recovery policies, agent coordination
deliverables: Model delay detection, notification, and contingency routing as a pipeline.
Design a compliance fan-out pattern with deduped findings.

blocks.title: Block 9 — Security + Capstone Build
blocks.coreSkill: Permissions, secrets, approval gates, pipeline blueprinting
deliverables: Scope agent permissions and secrets for production freight workflows.
Ship a capstone design that becomes the Phase 2 implementation backlog.

close.title: Day 2 Close
close.summary: Capstone share-out, Phase 2 preview, async learning path, and feedback channel setup.
actions: Present pipeline design as Problem → Architecture → Safety Decision.
Activate async modules M08, M11, M12, and challenge missions.
Set up the support channel for implementation blockers and follow-through.

useCases.title: BOL Data Extraction Pipeline
useCases.description: Extract shipper name, consignee, commodity, weight, piece count, PRO number, and SCAC code from scanned Bills of Lading with confidence-scored JSON output.

useCases.title: Carrier Intelligence Scoring
useCases.description: Read FMCSA data, claims history, and lane performance to pre-score carriers in seconds rather than manual 20-minute multi-source review.

useCases.title: Shipment Detail Extraction from Emails
useCases.description: Parse carrier and customer emails into structured shipment context including origin, destination, commodity, timing, and special requirements.

useCases.title: Carrier Communication Classification
useCases.description: Classify incoming carrier communications by urgency and type so delays, capacity alerts, and compliance issues route to the right operating queue.

useCases.title: Exception Report Summarization
useCases.description: Summarize last week’s delays, missed pickups, claims, and detention incidents into standup-ready operational briefs.

useCases.title: RavenEye Codebase Configuration
useCases.description: Configure RavenEye’s CLAUDE.md hierarchy with Zod validation, /api/v2/ conventions, and safe permission defaults before shipping a real PR.

useCases.title: RavenEye PR Review Automation
useCases.description: Run agent-assisted code review on each RavenEye PR against local codebase standards and security constraints.

useCases.title: Rate Quote Extraction from Carrier Sheets
useCases.description: Extract rate sheets and carrier quote emails with explicit rules for lane codes, accessorials, minimums, and effective dates.

useCases.title: FMCSA Carrier Authority Verification
useCases.description: Check carrier authority, MC/USDOT numbers, insurance, and safety ratings through a production MCP tool surface.

useCases.title: Build RavenEye MCP Server
useCases.description: Build a working MCP server that connects Claude to Raven operational data with production-safe schema design and error handling.

useCases.title: Live Shipment GPS Tracking via MCP
useCases.description: Expose read-only shipment position and tracking-feed state as addressable MCP resources for operational agents.

useCases.title: Exception Report via MCP Prompt
useCases.description: Template a reusable exception-report prompt that turns delayed-load data into structured operations reporting.

useCases.title: Freight Operational Skills Library
useCases.description: Author carrier-scorer, /bol-extract, and exception-report skills that persist Raven’s operating patterns beyond the live sessions.

useCases.title: Delay Detection & Auto-Notification
useCases.description: Split tracking analysis, customer notification, and contingency routing into coordinated agents that hand off state cleanly.

useCases.title: Compliance Verification Pipeline
useCases.description: Run carrier authority, insurance, and hazmat documentation checks in parallel and aggregate them back into a single compliance response.

useCases.title: HUMAN GATE Approval Pattern
useCases.description: Require human sign-off before rate changes, rebooking shipments, or public/customer communications with real operational impact.

useCases.title: Agent Secrets & Permission Audit
useCases.description: Audit API keys and permission scopes for freight systems touching carrier data, finance, and exception handling at production scale.

useCases.title: Carrier Intelligence Pipeline Capstone
useCases.description: Turn the live course into a Phase 2-ready design document covering trigger, context, decision logic, action scope, and output delivery.

builtInResources.title: Raven 2-Day Mapping PDF
builtInResources.description: Original 2-day breakdown used to derive the extracted course chronology.

builtInResources.title: Raven Use Case Dashboard HTML
builtInResources.description: Original dashboard reference containing the schedule, use cases, and CETI/Raven design language.

builtInResources.title: Async Module 08 — Meta-Prompting
builtInResources.description: Post-course prompt refinement and meta-prompting continuation.

builtInResources.title: Async Module 11 — Tech Stack Adaptation
builtInResources.description: Apply course patterns to RavenEye’s real stack and integration boundaries.

builtInResources.title: Async Module 12 — Capstone & Production
builtInResources.description: Full production follow-through for Phase 2 implementation work.

builtInResources.title: Challenge Missions 1.1–3.2
builtInResources.description: Take-home assignments referenced at Day 2 close.
